2008.issue: [S2008] Version 7.0.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v7.0.0" was found for current release 7.0.0. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.youtube/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.youtube/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
